*Monday’s veil falls silently —*   She moves through shadows, sipping coffee and secrets.
Some people can’t be trusted — they’ll twist the truth to soothe their guilt, not your pain. Keep them away — not out of hate, but to protect your peace.
Sometimes I randomly shoot people from Second Life…   and this comes out —   a spark, a glance, a whole story   caught in a single frozen frame.
Sometimes I randomly shoot people from Second Life…   and this comes out —   a spark, a glance, a whole story   caught in a single frozen frame.

Some miss you when you're gone,   some pretend you never existed.   Some stay friends,   others wish you to hell.    She shrugged her shoulders—   she knows:   the story always changes,   depending who tells it.
All those years taught her well — now her heart beats steady, carved from wood, no longer easy to break.
Don’t confuse crumbs with care,   or silence with peace,   nor emptiness with love —
This is me — allergic to narcissists, liars, and cheaters.   Truth is my peace, honesty my oxygen.   Keep it real, or keep your distance.
I hide in shadows from the many,   but for the rare and quiet few,   I bloom—softly, wholly,   like a secret whispered into dawn.
Some people think a new avatar  and a new name and face will erase their past. But masks don’t fool those who truly see.
Head tilted like a curious cat… but don’t be fooled — she’s already three steps ahead.
Some friendships start with a smile, others with a silly dance , hello Matthew, nice to meet you.
"If you ever wonder why—think harder. The answer might sting."
Come to me my sweetest friend, Where silence speaks and hearts remember
A touch of fire,   A quiet storm,   She bends the world   And breaks the norm.
Fingers in her hair, silence on her lips — she moves where only she decides.
She moves by the rhythm of her own heart."

She is the mystery—not to be solved, but to be felt.   A glance from her lingers longer than a thousand words.   She won’t let you in easily.   But once she does…   you’ll realize she always knew you.   Long before you tried to understand her.
My heart beats in shadows, drawn to your presence—like a secret it longs to be felt.
The heart knows what it wants. The rest is just silence and signs.
She’s unreadable, unshaken. While you try to figure her out, she’s already one step ahead.
“With one step forward, I left the past behind. No need to turn around, the past has no claim on me anymore. the future is ahead.”
Getting ready for a night filled with magic where every moment feels like a whispered secret.

Every once in a while, I have a quiet chat with an old friend the kind that needs no words, only presence. Go and see konrad’s and Saskia’s sim at natthimmel.  I’m not a landscaper picture maker so I made one of him instead.
The heaviness fades. From here, light finds its way back.
I’ll be waiting:))
*"I see more than most realize. I carry more than I show. I can handle almost anything—except a lie."*
Sometimes, the heart needs nothing more than waiting on a friend.
I am made of pieces, each holding a fragment of my happiness.
When memories fade like the sun setting into the sea, only the feeling remains warm, quiet, endless.
The ocean breathes beneath a fading sky, and in its rhythm, I wait — not counting time, only hoping your soul feels mine across the tide.
Independent, not because I must — but because I can.
Seeing you again felt gentle, like the universe quietly reminding me that some connections don’t fade — they just wait."*
